data.content: Implemented dispatch mode rename from actions/pools to basic/advanced across schema, settings loading, runtime branches, setup writers, OpenAPI/docs, and UI state. Added legacy normalization on settings read so existing TOML values actions/pools still load and backfill/save rewrite canonical values. Updated unit tests and writer tests for canonical values plus legacy-read coverage. Verification: bun run lint (passes with pre-existing warnings outside this change), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
